title: Discipline vs Motivation
context: Human behavior, habit-building, creator consistency, and long-term goal execution
surface_question: Which is better, discipline or motivation?
b_causal_chain: feeling -> energy -> action -> emotional decay -> inconsistency risk
hidden_difference: Motivation depends on emotional weather. Discipline survives emotional change.
a_failure_mode: Discipline fails when it becomes rigid, meaningless, punitive, or unsustainable.
b_failure_mode: Motivation fails when excitement, fear, urgency, or inspiration fades.
conditional_verdict: Use motivation to start. Use discipline to continue.
final_line: Motivation starts motion. Discipline preserves motion.
